files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+name: ci
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  build:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
+
+      - name: Setup Go
+        uses: actions/setup-go@v6
+        with:
+          go-version-file: go.mod
+
+      - name: Install tools
+        run: |
+          go install mvdan.cc/gofumpt@v0.9.2
+          go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2/cmd/golangci-lint@v2.7.2
+
+      - name: Format
+        run: test -z "$(gofumpt -l .)"
+
+      - name: Lint
+        run: golangci-lint run
+
+      - name: Test
+        run: go test ./... -cover

@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+version: 2
+
+run:
+  timeout: 5m
+  tests: true
+
+linters:
+  enable:
+    - errcheck
+    - govet
+    - staticcheck
+    - unused
+    - ineffassign
+    - errorlint
+    - bodyclose
+    - bidichk
+    - misspell
+    - unconvert
+    - prealloc
+    - predeclared
+    - nolintlint
+    - unparam
+
+formatters:
+  enable:
+    - gofumpt
+
+issues:
+  exclude-use-default: false

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+.PHONY: fmt lint test check build cover snap
+
+fmt:
+	gofumpt -w .
+
+lint:
+	golangci-lint run
+
+test:
+	go test ./... -cover
+
+check:
+	go vet ./...
+
+build:
+	go build ./...
+
+cover:
+	go test ./... -coverprofile=coverage.out
+	go tool cover -func=coverage.out
+
+snap:
+	node scripts/ghostty-web-snap.mjs

@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+fmt:
+	gofumpt -w .
+

+

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "name": "gifgrep",
+  "version": "0.1.0",
+  "private": true,
+  "scripts": {
+    "start": "go run ./cmd/gifgrep",
+    "tenor": "pnpm start",
+    "fmt": "gofumpt -w .",
+    "lint": "golangci-lint run",
+    "snap": "node scripts/ghostty-web-snap.mjs",
+    "build": "go build ./...",
+    "test": "go test ./...",
+    "check": "go vet ./..."
+  },
+  "devDependencies": {
+    "playwright": "^1.57.0"
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+lockfileVersion: '9.0'
+
+settings:
+  autoInstallPeers: true
+  excludeLinksFromLockfile: false
+
+importers:
+
+  .:
+    devDependencies:
+      playwright:
+        specifier: ^1.57.0
+        version: 1.57.0
+
+packages:
+
+  fsevents@2.3.2:
+    resolution: {integrity: sha512-xiqMQR4xAeHTuB9uWm+fFRcIOgKBMiOBP+eXiyT7jsgVCq1bkVygt00oASowB7EdtpOHaaPgKt812P9ab+DDKA==}
+    engines: {node: ^8.16.0 || ^10.6.0 || >=11.0.0}
+    os: [darwin]
+
+  playwright-core@1.57.0:
+    resolution: {integrity: sha512-agTcKlMw/mjBWOnD6kFZttAAGHgi/Nw0CZ2o6JqWSbMlI219lAFLZZCyqByTsvVAJq5XA5H8cA6PrvBRpBWEuQ==}
+    engines: {node: '>=18'}
+    hasBin: true
+
+  playwright@1.57.0:
+    resolution: {integrity: sha512-ilYQj1s8sr2ppEJ2YVadYBN0Mb3mdo9J0wQ+UuDhzYqURwSoW4n1Xs5vs7ORwgDGmyEh33tRMeS8KhdkMoLXQw==}
+    engines: {node: '>=18'}
+    hasBin: true
+
+snapshots:
+
+  fsevents@2.3.2:
+    optional: true
+
+  playwright-core@1.57.0: {}
+
+  playwright@1.57.0:
+    dependencies:
+      playwright-core: 1.57.0
+    optionalDependencies:
+      fsevents: 2.3.2
